title: Insurance Claims Dashboard
short: Executive insurance analytics for claims, loss ratios and SLA monitoring.
overview: A star-schema Power BI solution to provide claim-level insights, SLA tracking and fraud indicators.
businessProblem: Claims operations lacked unified metrics across lines of business and SLA breaches were not visible until post-period close.
sql:
-- Sample SQL to aggregate claims by month
SELECT YEAR(c.claim_date) as yr, MONTH(c.claim_date) as mth, COUNT(*) as claims_count, SUM(c.settlement_amount) as total_settlement
FROM claims c
GROUP BY YEAR(c.claim_date), MONTH(c.claim_date);
powerQuery:
// Sample Power Query steps
let
  Source = Sql.Database("server","db"),
  Claims = Source{[Schema="dbo",Item="claims"]}[Data]
in
  Claims
dataModel: Star schema with FactClaims and DimPolicy, DimDate, DimCustomer.
insights: Top 3 drivers of loss ratio are region X, product family Y and channel Z. Implementing automated alerts reduced SLA breaches by 35%.
challenges: Heterogeneous source systems and late-arriving transactions required robust incremental refresh and staging.

title: Sales Performance Platform
short: Region-level sales insights with quota tracking and top-performers dashboard.
